page_metadata.biotools__summary: Machine learning tool set and web application for monoallelic gene inference from chromatin. Classifies genes into monoallelically expressed (MAE) and biallelically expressed (BAE) using chromatin mark enrichment data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Machine learning tool set and web application for monoallelic gene inference from chromatin. Classifies genes into monoallelically expressed (MAE) and biallelically expressed (BAE) using chromatin mark enrichment data.
